steps.name: $("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)

$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[2]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Floors')] and th[contains(text(), 'Price')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
